evidence_quotes.quote: the permanent purchase of a digital item
video game relies upon a connection to proprietary online services to fulfill it's advertised functions

paragraphs.text: I would like for the Digital Fairness Act to consider action against the video games industry. First point to consider would be customers being misled by up front wording suggesting the permanent purchase of a digital item with only a lengthy terms of sale document stating that it is in fact not, that rather it a temporary license to use the digital item. Second point to consider would be that in cases where the video game relies upon a connection to proprietary online services to fulfill it's advertised functions, many video game developers, publishers, rights holders have chosen to discontinue said services, making the video game dysfunctional.
